case_title: BRANDY RODRIGUIZ VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($35 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED FEB-17-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT INTRACHAT, PIMOL
ORIGINAL EXHIBITS, RECEIVED BY MAIL, FOR TELEPHONE APPEARANCE. AS TO DEFENDANT INTRACHAT, PIMOL

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY RODRIGUIZ, BRANDY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO INTRACHAT, BROOKE PATRA INTRACHAT, PIMOL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR CONSIDERATION. FILED BY DEFENDANT INTRACHAT, PIMOL
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED & FILED FILED BY DEFENDANT INTRACHAT, PIMOL
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-30-2011 AT 10:00AM.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-30-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-30-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-30-2011 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL-

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUIZ, BRANDY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INTRACHAT, BROOKE PATRA INTRACHAT, PIMOL $3,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,860.00, PLAINTIFF'S FAULT = 50%. DEFENDANT'S FAULT = 50%. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT INTRACHAT, BROOKE PATRA INTRACHAT, PIMOL
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
